glosses.ja: 転送する; 送金する

sentences.target: Je transfère l'argent sur ton compte.

translations.fr: Je transfère l'argent sur ton compte.
translations.en: I'm transferring the money to your account.
translations.es: Estoy transfiriendo el dinero a tu cuenta.
translations.de: Ich überweise das Geld auf dein Konto.
translations.it: Sto trasferendo i soldi sul tuo conto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在把钱转到你的账户。
translations.ru: Я перевожу деньги на твой счёт.
translations.pt: Estou transferindo o dinheiro para a sua conta.
translations.he: אני מעביר את הכסף לחשבון שלך.
translations.vi: Tôi đang chuyển tiền vào tài khoản của bạn.
translations.nl: Ik maak het geld over naar je rekening.
translations.uk: Я переказую гроші на твій рахунок.
translations.hi: मैं पैसे तुम्हारे खाते में ट्रांसफर कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Μεταφέρω τα χρήματα στον λογαριασμό σου.
translations.nb: Jeg overfører pengene til kontoen din.
translations.sv: Jag för över pengarna till ditt konto.
translations.da: Jeg overfører pengene til din konto.
translations.ja: あなたの口座にお金を振り込んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; agrees with the subject 'Je'.
Elided definite article before a vowel-initial noun; marks a definite direct object.
Masculine singular noun; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, masculine singular; modifies 'compte'.
Noun; object of the preposition 'sur' and head of the noun phrase.

sentences.target: Tu transfères les photos sur l'ordinateur.

translations.fr: Tu transfères les photos sur l'ordinateur.
translations.en: You're transferring the photos to the computer.
translations.es: Estás transfiriendo las fotos al ordenador.
translations.de: Du überträgst die Fotos auf den Computer.
translations.it: Stai trasferendo le foto sul computer.
translations.zh-Hans: 你正在把照片传到电脑上。
translations.yue: 你而家將相片轉到電腦度。
translations.pt: Você está transferindo as fotos para o computador.
translations.vi: Bạn đang chuyển ảnh sang máy tính.
translations.nl: Je zet de foto's over naar de computer.
translations.hi: तुम फ़ोटो कंप्यूटर में ट्रांसफर कर रहे हो.
translations.id: Kamu sedang memindahkan foto ke komputer.
translations.ja: 写真をパソコンに転送しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; agrees with 'Tu'.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'photos'.
Plural noun; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Elided definite article before a vowel-initial noun; determiner of 'ordinateur'.
Masculine singular noun; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Tu peux transférer l'appel au service client.
sentences.reading: /ty pø tʁɑ̃s.fe.ʁe lapɛl o sɛʁ.vis klijɑ̃/

translations.fr: Tu peux transférer l'appel au service client.
translations.ipa: /ty pø tʁɑ̃s.fe.ʁe lapɛl o sɛʁ.vis klijɑ̃/
translations.en: Can you transfer the call to customer service?
translations.es: Por favor, transfiere la llamada al servicio de atención al cliente.
translations.de: Bitte leite den Anruf an den Kundendienst weiter.
translations.it: Per favore, trasferisci la chiamata all'assistenza clienti.
translations.yue: 麻煩你把來電轉駁去客戶服務部。
translations.ru: Пожалуйста, переведите звонок на службу поддержки.
translations.pt: Por favor, transfira a chamada para o atendimento ao cliente.
translations.he: בבקשה תעביר את השיחה לשירות הלקוחות.
translations.vi: Vui lòng chuyển cuộc gọi đến bộ phận chăm sóc khách hàng.
translations.ar: من فضلك حوّل المكالمة إلى خدمة العملاء.
translations.nl: Verbind het gesprek alsjeblieft door naar de klantenservice.
translations.uk: Будь ласка, переадресуй дзвінок до служби підтримки.
translations.hu: Kérlek, kapcsold át a hívást az ügyfélszolgálatra.
translations.hi: कृपया कॉल को कस्टमर केयर पर ट्रांसफर करें.
translations.pl: Proszę przełączyć rozmowę do obsługi klienta.
translations.el: Παρακαλώ μεταβιβάστε την κλήση στην εξυπηρέτηση πελατών.
translations.id: Tolong alihkan panggilan ke layanan pelanggan.
translations.ro: Te rog, transferă apelul la serviciul clienți.
translations.cs: Prosím, přepojte hovor na zákaznický servis.
translations.da: Vær venlig at viderestille opkaldet til kundeservice.
translations.fi: Ole hyvä ja yhdistä puhelu asiakaspalveluun.
translations.ja: カスタマーサービスに電話を転送してください。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 2nd person singular; forms a verbal periphrasis with the infinitive.
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal 'peux'.
Elided definite article before a vowel-initial noun; determiner of 'appel'.
Masculine singular noun; direct object of 'transférer'.
Preposition contracted with the definite article ('à' + 'le'); introduces the prepositional object.
Noun; object of the preposition 'au' and head of the noun phrase.
Post-nominal noun modifier specifying type ('service client' = customer service).

sentences.target: Ils transfèrent les fichiers sur la clé USB.
sentences.reading: /il tʁɑ̃s.fɛʁ le fi.ʃje syʁ la kle y.ɛs.be/

translations.fr: Ils transfèrent les fichiers sur la clé USB.
translations.ipa: /il tʁɑ̃s.fɛʁ le fi.ʃje syʁ la kle y.ɛs.be/
translations.en: They're transferring the files to the USB drive.
translations.es: Están transfiriendo los archivos a la memoria USB.
translations.de: Sie übertragen die Dateien auf den USB-Stick.
translations.it: Stanno trasferendo i file sulla chiavetta USB.
translations.ko: 그들은 파일을 USB 드라이브로 옮기고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们正在把文件传到U盘上。
translations.yue: 佢哋將檔案傳到USB手指度。
translations.pt: Eles estão transferindo os arquivos para o pen drive.
translations.he: הם מעבירים את הקבצים לכונן ה-USB.
translations.vi: Họ đang chuyển các tệp vào ổ USB.
translations.ar: إنهم ينقلون الملفات إلى ذاكرة USB.
translations.nl: Ze zetten de bestanden over naar de usb-stick.
translations.hi: वे फाइलें यूएसबी ड्राइव पर ट्रांसफर कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Μεταφέρουν τα αρχεία στο USB στικάκι.
translations.id: Mereka sedang memindahkan berkas ke flashdisk.
translations.ro: Ei transferă fișierele pe stickul USB.
translations.cs: Přenášejí soubory na USB flash disk.
translations.ja: 彼らはファイルをUSBメモリに転送しています.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural; subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; agrees with 'Ils'.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'fichiers'.
Plural noun; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'clé'.
Feminine noun; object of the preposition 'sur'.
Acronym used as a post-nominal specifier; denotes the type of key (USB flash drive).
